# Carbon Capture and Storage

Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) captures CO₂ from industrial emissions or atmosphere. Direct Air Capture (DAC) extracts CO₂ from air. [[ipcc-ar6-report]] considers CCS necessary for net zero. Closely linked to carbon pricing in [[climate-economics]].
